description: Composition Red and blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline and ruffles on the edges, a full front press buttoned placket, ruffles on half the placket, short sleeves with elastic on the top of the cuffs, yoke at the back with branding and a curved hemFit RegularWash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergentWash and dry inside outDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron;Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its short gathered sleeves enhances your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and casual shoes or cotton shorts and sandals.Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
